market_overview.headline: Market showing conflicting signals with SPY breaking down while QQQ holds unstacked bullish structure, as crypto remains deeply bearish.
market_overview.detail: 32.7% of stocks in Full Bull vs 29.3% in Full Bear, but major indices diverging with SPY in Bull Breakdown and BTC down -45% from fair value. Energy and materials leading while tech services getting crushed.

reversal_candidates.headline: Bear Rally Reversal Candidates (Bullish Crossover Alerts)

momentum_themes.headline: Electronic Technology & Energy Leading Momentum
momentum_themes.detail: Storage and memory stocks dominating with SNDK (+56% vs 21W), WDC, MU showing massive acceleration. Energy minerals maintaining 100% bullish participation with strong 8W performance.

sector_analysis.headline: Sector Rotation: Resources vs Tech Services Divergence

strongest.note: Perfect bullish participation with 16.3% average gains vs 21W.
Materials complex showing uniform strength with mining stocks leading.
Semiconductor and hardware showing strong momentum despite some weakness.

weakest.note: Software and cloud getting obliterated with 90% bearish participation.
Banking sector under pressure despite some early reversal signals.
Business services completely bearish with deep downdrafts.

sector_analysis.detail: Clear rotation from growth tech into cyclical resources and hardware. Energy/materials at 100% bullish while tech services 90% bearish shows dramatic style shift.

items.text: SPY Bull Breakdown with EMAs compressing suggests broad market vulnerability
BTC Full Bear at -45% from fair value indicating risk-off environment persisting
High volume pullback in ADTTF (5.71x avg) suggests potential institutional distribution
29 Bull Breakdowns indicate many uptrends cracking under pressure
